arts.ttl: £5.3bn deal cited as Kieran Maguire issues verdict on Nassef Sawiris ending Aston Villa investment
Aston Villa begin 'direct negotiations' for transfer as loan 'enquiry' made
arts.sum: The report claims that Skriniar has decided to leave PSG in Janaury, with Tottenham also said to be interested. And reports in L'Equipe have claimed that Villa have started direct negotiations with Ligue 2’s Caen to sign Tidiam Gomes.

arts.ttl: 'Big challenge' - Potter takes charge at West Ham
arts.sum: West Ham appoint former Brighton and Chelsea boss Graham Potter as their new manager.

arts.ttl: Alex Crook makes 'Bizarre' West Ham claim after Everton announcement tonight
arts.sum: Alex Crook has shared a “bizarre” claim on the sacking of Julen Lopetegui at West Ham United after breaking Everton news emerged. A day after... The post Alex Crook makes 'Bizarre' West Ham claim after Everton announcement tonight appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: David Moyes in talks over remarkable return to Everton after Sean Dyche sacking
arts.sum: Moyes was previously in charge at Goodison Park between 2002 and 2013

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche's Everton axe clears way for David Moyes to make final journey to spiritual home
arts.sum: The timing looked odd but The Friedkin Group have acted decisively and a former manager now seems an obvious choice to spearhead the owners' bold, new era

arts.ttl: Moyes in contention for Everton return after Dyche sacked
arts.sum: David Moyes has held discussions with Everton's owners The Friedkin Group and could make a return to the club as early as this weekend after Sean Dyche was sacked on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: When Everton plan to announce David Moyes as new manager as he agrees to return
arts.sum: David Moyes has agreed to become the new Everton manager 🚨🔙

arts.ttl: Sources: Moyes in line to replace Dyche at Everton
arts.sum: David Moyes is on the verge of sealing a return to Everton after talks with the club's new owners, who fired manager Sean Dyche on Thursday, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Everton owners' reason for rejecting Jose Mourinho as David Moyes set for emotional return
arts.sum: Everton have sacked Sean Dyche and former Toffees boss David Moyes is their top target to replace him, with Jose Mourinho not in contention for a Premier League return
